title: Cable Tray Installation
description: Professional cable tray installation services for industrial and commercial projects in Hong Kong.
overview: DES provides professional cable tray installation services for electrical and instrumentation systems. Our team ensures proper installation, alignment, and support for all types of cable management systems.
